title: The Residences at Lynn Valley
description: A Must See! The Residences at Lynn Valley. A concrete Townhome built by Bosa Developments. Bright open concept 3 bed + den, 2.5 bath. TWO side-by-side Parking and TWO Locker with 154 Sqft Patio. High ceiling in primary bed (11ft), Modern kitchen interior; All counters are quartz, high end Bosch appliances, gas cooktop and hardwood flooring. Central A/C. 17,000 Sq ft of indoor and outdoor amenities including gym, yoga, sauna/steam room, outdoor BBQ area/social lounge, kids playground, dog wash station and more. In the heart of Lynn Valley Centre.
